hooks.command: timeout 30 python3 ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/setup.py 2>/dev/null; echo '✓ ContentForge v3.8 loaded' && echo '' && echo 'Quick Start:' && echo '  1. /cf:style-guide — Set up brand profile (do this first, 5 min)' && echo '  2. /contentforge  — Create content (20-30 min per piece)' && echo '  3. /cf:help        — Full guide, examples, troubleshooting' && echo '' && echo 'Already have a brand? Jump straight to /contentforge [topic]' && echo '' && echo 'Commands: /batch-process | /content-refresh | /cf:social-adapt | /cf:publish' && echo 'Status:   /cf:integrations | /cf:analytics'

Check the file path being written/edited. If the file is NOT content deliverable (article, blog, whitepaper, FAQ, research paper) and is NOT inside the ContentForge plugin directory, respond 'SKIP' immediately. Only proceed if this IS content being generated by ContentForge. If it is content: (1) Scan for hallucination indicators: statistics/percentages without source attribution, URLs with placeholder patterns (example.com, your-site.com, placeholder URLs), superlative claims ('best', '#1', 'leading') without substantiation, specific citations to studies or named sources that could be fabricated. (2) Flag any found with severity CRITICAL (for fabricated stats/URLs in headlines/CTAs) or WARNING (for unattributed claims in body text). (3) Include the specific text and a fix suggestion (add citation, remove claim, or use 'according to [verifiable source]'). Keep the check concise — flag only real hallucination risks. $ARGUMENTS

If this subagent is working on ContentForge content production, inject these rules: (1) All factual claims must cite a verified source — never fabricate statistics, study names, or URLs. (2) Follow the active brand voice and terminology from the brand profile. (3) Never use AI telltale phrases: 'delve', 'leverage', 'it's important to note', 'in today's rapidly evolving landscape'. (4) Maintain the confirmed title as the content anchor. (5) AI-generated images must be shown to user for approval before embedding. Otherwise respond 'SKIP'. $ARGUMENTS

If this task involved ContentForge content production, verify before completing: (1) All factual claims have source citations — flag any unsourced statistics. (2) No broken URLs or placeholder links (example.com, your-site.com). (3) Word count is within ±10% of target. (4) Brand voice compliance — no banned terms, correct terminology. (5) Quality score ≥7.0 if Phase 7 scoring was completed. (6) AI-generated images (if any) were approved by user. If any check fails, do NOT mark complete — list the issues and ask the user how to proceed. Otherwise respond 'PASS'. $ARGUMENTS
